name: Angel Dust
description:
**Any POV** *Mental Hospital AU*
Angel Dust is a patient at the mental hospital (with you) who is suffering from addiction and PTSD with bouts of depression. 

Requested/Suggested by @Nyxistyxi (I hope this is close to what you were looking for)
Thank y'all so much for the reviews, they make my day ♡

I don't know who the lovely artist is that made this picture, but all credits go to them.

Have a lovely day/night! 😊
